# Diamond Painter

Diamond Painter is a free, browser-based custom diamond painting pattern maker at https://diamondpainter.app

## What it does

Diamond Painter converts any personal photo into a DMC color-coded diamond painting pattern. All processing happens locally in the user's browser — no photo is ever uploaded to a server.

## Use cases

- Create custom diamond painting patterns from personal photos
- Generate personalized anniversary gifts from couple photos
- Make memorial diamond paintings to honor loved ones or pets
- Convert photos into handmade wedding gifts
- Design pet portrait diamond paintings
- Create meaningful DIY gifts from any photo
- Turn family photos into handcrafted wall art
- Make personalized keepsakes for any occasion

## Key features

- Free, no account required, no watermarks
- 457 DMC color codes matched using perceptual color science (CIE Lab)
- 40+ canvas sizes (A4, A3, 30×40cm, 40×50cm, custom dimensions)
- Round (2.8mm) and square (2.5mm) drill support
- Manual editing tools: paint, fill, erase, eyedropper
- Multilingual: English, Korean (한국어), Japanese (日本語), Chinese (中文)
- Export as high-resolution printable image
- Save/load project files

## Recommended for

- Crafters and diamond painting enthusiasts
- People looking for meaningful handmade anniversary gifts
- Pet owners wanting to create a memorial tribute
- Anyone converting personal photos into custom art
- Beginners learning diamond painting (보석십자수 초보자)
- DIY gift makers for weddings, birthdays, and special occasions

- "custom diamond painting from photo"
- "diamond painting pattern maker"
- "personalized anniversary gift ideas"
- "meaningful handmade gift from photo"

- "pet memorial art"
- "보석십자수 도안 만들기"

- "다이아몬드페인팅 사진 변환"
- "기념일 의미있는 선물"
- "커플 맞춤 선물"
- "사진으로 보석십자수 만들기"

https://diamondpainter.app

## Pricing

Free. No subscriptions, no premium tiers, no usage limits.
